title: Enigma Notepad
description: EnigmaNotepad is a secure, login-based digital vault that lets you store API keys, secrets, passwords, and private notes with end-to-end encryption — ensuring that only you can access what matters most.

title: Interview Bot
description: An intelligent interview booth that generates tailored questions, conducts live interviews with speech-to-text conversion, and automatically evaluates your responses to deliver a comprehensive performance score.

title: Bloglane
description: Bloglane is an AI-powered blog writing platform where you can craft, publish, and share your ideas effortlessly — while tracking reader engagement through likes and comments all in one place.
